title: Ethan's Cologne Experience
description: This mod introduces an exciting new way to enhance your gameplay with over 30 unique colognes! Each cologne provides special effects, offering a fun and stylish alternative to traditional potions.
body:
This mod introduces an exciting new way to enhance your gameplay with over 30 unique colognes! Each cologne provides special effects, offering a fun and stylish alternative to traditional potions.

 

With Ethan's Cologne Experience, you can expand your limits and gain powerful potion effects while immersing yourself in a fresh and creative mechanic. These colognes are perfect for players seeking a new twist to boost their modded adventure.

 

Why stick to ordinary potions when you can elevate your experience with a splash of sophistication? Explore, strategize, and enjoy the benefits of these delightful colognes as they help you along your journey!

 

The colognes contains vanilla Minecraft potion effects!

Find more of my mods here- [Click here](https://sweatcheeks6.wixsite.com/my-site-1)
